# Plantified

> Plantified is a desk-plant shop landing page. It showcases low maintenance
> plants for workspaces, a plant picker, care guidance, and a newsletter.

## Sections

- Home: hero — "Life is too short, Bring a green friend"
- Plants: interactive picker featuring Spike the cactus and five other desk plants
- Categories: plant personality cards (Ivy, Mint, Spike) with prices
- Care steps: Unboxing, First Mist, Routine, Watch it grow
- Seasonal care: watering, feeding, and light tips for all four seasons
- Newsletter: email signup for plant care tips and delivery
